title: Daemon crypto: AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt roundtrip
description: Verify encryption and decryption with sequence-bound AAD, and failure modes

steps.action: Generate a session key, encrypt a JSON payload with seq=1
steps.expected: Returns object with base64 payload and base64 nonce

steps.action: Decrypt the ciphertext with the same key and seq=1
Attempt to decrypt with wrong session key
steps.expected: Throws error (GCM auth tag verification failed)

steps.action: Attempt to decrypt with correct key but wrong seq (seq=2 instead of 1)
steps.expected: Throws error (AAD mismatch causes GCM auth failure)

steps.action: Encrypt two messages with seq=1 and seq=2
steps.expected: Different nonces, different ciphertexts (even for same plaintext)

steps.action: Tamper with one byte of the ciphertext, attempt decrypt
